title: rubus metallicola
intro: Rubus metallicola, also known as the metallic dog rose or metallic bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and menstrual problems due to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus metallicola include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for alleviating symptoms of fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Rubus metallicola is often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional formulas.
